metadata.summary: Contains the caqtus device extension for the Hamamatsu Orca Quest camera.

documentation:
Readme
======

Installation
------------

The following python package must be installed from PyPI: `caqtus-devices-hamamatsu-orca-quest`.

In addition, to use this package to communicate with the camera, the Hamamatsu DCAM-API 
must be installed.
Usage
-----

The package provides the `caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.extension` that
can be registered with the 
[`caqtus.extension.Experiment.register_device_extension`](https://caqtus.readthedocs.io/en/latest/_autosummary/caqtus.extension.Experiment.html#caqtus.extension.Experiment.register_device_extension) 
method.

```python
from caqtus_devices.cameras import hamamatsu_orca_quest

from caqtus.extension import Experiment

my_experiment = Experiment(...)
my_experiment.register_device_extension(hamamatsu_orca_quest.extension)

```

classes.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.configuration.configuration.OrcaQuestCameraConfiguration
documentation:
Holds the configuration for an OrcaQuest camera.

Attributes:
    camera_number: The number of the camera to use.
    roi: The region of interest to capture from the camera.

classes.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.runtime.OrcaQuestCamera
documentation:
Beware that not all roi values are allowed for this camera.
In doubt, try to check if the ROI is valid using the HCImageLive software.

Attributes:
    camera_number: The camera number used to identify the specific camera.

functions.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcam.dcammisc_setupframe
documentation: Setup DCAMBUF_FRAME instance based on camera setting with hdcam

functions.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcam.dcammisc_alloc_ndarray
documentation: Allocate NumPy ndarray based on information of DCAMBUF_FRAME.

methods.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcam.Dcamapi.__result
documentation: Internal use. Keep last error code

methods.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcam.Dcamapi.lasterr
documentation: Return last error code of Dcamapi member functions

methods.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcam.Dcamapi.init
documentation:
Initialize dcamapi.
Do not call this when Dcam object exists because constructor of Dcam ececute this.
After calling close(), call this again if you need to resume measurement.

Returns:
    True:   if dcamapi_init() succeeded.
    False:  if dcamapi_init() returned DCAMERR except SUCCESS.  lasterr() returns the DCAMERR value.

methods.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcam.Dcamapi.uninit
documentation:
Uninitlaize dcamapi.
After using DCAM-API, call this function to close all resources.

Returns:
    True:

methods.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcam.Dcamapi.get_devicecount
documentation:
Return number of connected cameras.

Returns:
    nDeviceCount
    False:  if not initialized.

documentation: the last error from functions with dcamapi_ prefix.

methods.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcam.Dcam.is_opened
documentation:
Check DCAM handle is opened.

Returns:
    True:   DCAM handle is opened
    False:  DCAM handle is not opened

methods.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcam.Dcam.dev_open
documentation:
Get HDCAM handle for controling camera.
After calling close(), call this again if you need to resume measurement.

Args:
    arg1(int): device index

Returns:
    True:   if dcamdev_open() succeeded.
    False:  if dcamdev_open() returned DCAMERR except SUCCESS.  lasterr() returns the DCAMERR value.

methods.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcam.Dcam.dev_close
documentation:
Close dcam handle.
Call this if you need to close the current device.

Returns:
    True:

Args:

methods.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcam.Dcam.buf_alloc
documentation:
Alloc DCAM internal buffer

Arg:
    arg1(int): Number of frames

Returns:
    True:   buffer is prepared.
    False:  buffer is not prepared.  lasterr() returns the DCAMERR value

methods.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcam.Dcam.buf_release
documentation:
Release DCAM internal buffer

Returns:
    True:   success
    False:  error happens during releasing buffer.  lasterr() returns the DCAMERR value

methods.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcam.Dcam.buf_getframe
documentation:
Return DCAMBUF_FRAME instance with image data specified by iFrame.

Arg:
    arg1(int): Index of target frame

Returns:
    (aFrame, npBuf): aFrame is DCAMBUF_FRAME, npBuf is NumPy buffer
    False:  error happens.  lasterr() returns the DCAMERR value

methods.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcam.Dcam.buf_getframedata
documentation:
Return NumPy buffer of image data specified by iFrame.

Arg:
    arg1(int): Index of target frame

Returns:
    npBuf:  NumPy buffer
    False:  error happens.  lasterr() returns the DCAMERR value

methods.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcam.Dcam.buf_getlastframedata
documentation:
Return NumPy buffer of image data of last updated frame

Returns:
    npBuf:  NumPy buffer
    False:  error happens.  lasterr() returns the DCAMERR value

methods.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcam.Dcam.wait_event
documentation:
Wait event

Arg:

Returns:

    False:  error happened.  lasterr() returns the DCAMERR value

Wait DCAMWAIT_CAPEVENT.FRAMEREADY event

Returns:

    False:  error happened.  lasterr() returns the DCAMERR value

modules.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4
documentation: Copyright (C) 2021 Hamamatsu Photonics K.K.. All right reserved.

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.BUSY
documentation: 0x80000101, API cannot process in busy state.

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.NOTSTABLE
documentation: 0x80000104, API requires stable or unstable state.

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.UNSTABLE
documentation: 0x80000105, API does not support in unstable state.

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.EXCLUDED
documentation: 0x80000110, some resource is exclusive and already used

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.NOTRIGGER
documentation: 0x80000303, no trigger when necessary. Some camera supports this error.

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.TOOFREQUENTTRIGGER
documentation: 0x80000305, input too frequent trigger. Some camera supports this error.

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.MISSINGFRAME_TROUBLE
documentation: 0x80000f06, frame is lost but reason is low lever driver's bug

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.INVALIDIMAGE
documentation: 0x80000321, hpk format data is invalid data

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.FRAMEGRABBER_NEEDS_FIRMWAREUPDATE
documentation: 0x80001002, need to update frame grabber firmware to use the camera

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.FAILOPENBUS
documentation: 0x81001001, the bus or driver are not available

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.NEWAPIREQUIRED
documentation: 0x80000826, old API cannot present the value because only new API need to be used

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.WRONGHANDSHAKE
documentation: 0x80000827, this error happens DCAM get error code from camera unexpectedly

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.NOPROPERTY
documentation: 0x80000828, there is no altenative or influence id, or no more property id

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.INVALIDCHANNEL
documentation: 0x80000829, the property id specifies channel but channel is invalid

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.INVALIDVIEW
documentation: 0x8000082a, the property id specifies channel but channel is invalid

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.INVALIDSUBARRAY
documentation: 0x8000082b, the combination of subarray values are invalid. e.g. DCAM_IDPROP_SUBARRAYHPOS + DCAM_IDPROP_SUBARRAYHSIZE is greater than the number of horizontal pixel of sensor.

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.ACCESSDENY
documentation: 0x8000082c, the property cannot access during this DCAM STATUS

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.NOVALUETEXT
documentation: 0x8000082d, the property does not have value text

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.WRONGPROPERTYVALUE
documentation: 0x8000082e, at least one property value is wrong

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.DISHARMONY
documentation: 0x80000830, the paired camera does not have same parameter

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.FRAMEBUNDLESHOULDBEOFF
documentation: 0x80000832, framebundle mode should be OFF under current property settings

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.NOCORRECTIONDATA
documentation: 0x80000838, not take the dark and shading correction data yet.

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.CHANNELDEPENDENTVALUE
documentation: 0x80000839, each channel has own property value so can't return overall property value.

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.VIEWDEPENDENTVALUE
documentation: 0x8000083a, each view has own property value so can't return overall property value.

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.NODEVICEBUFFER
documentation: 0x8000083b, the frame count is larger than device momory size on using device memory.

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.REQUIREDSNAP
documentation: 0x8000083c, the capture mode is sequence on using device memory.

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.LESSSYSTEMMEMORY
documentation: 0x8000083f, the sysmte memory size is too small. PC doesn't have enough memory or is limited memory by 32bit OS.

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.NOTSUPPORT
documentation: 0x80000f03, camera does not support the function or property with current settings

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.FAILREADCAMERA
documentation: 0x83001002, failed to read data from camera

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.FAILWRITECAMERA
documentation: 0x83001003, failed to write data to the camera

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.CONFLICTCOMMPORT
documentation: 0x83001004, conflict the com port name user set

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.OPTICS_UNPLUGGED
documentation: 0x83001005, Optics part is unplugged so please check it.

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.MISMATCH_CONFIGURATION
documentation: 0x83001011, mismatch between camera output(connection) and frame grabber specs

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.FAILEDOPENRECFILE
documentation: 0x84001001, DCAMREC failed to open the file

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.FAILEDWRITEDATA
documentation: 0x84001003, DCAMREC failed to write the data

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.FAILEDREADDATA
documentation: 0x84001004, DCAMREC failed to read the data

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.WRITEFULL
documentation: 0x84001006, DCAMREC writes full frame of the session

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.ALREADYOCCUPIED
documentation: 0x84001007, DCAMREC handle is already occupied by other HDCAM

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.TOOLARGEUSERDATASIZE
documentation: 0x84001008, DCAMREC is set the large value to user data size

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.NEWRUNTIMEREQUIRED
documentation: 0x84002002, DCAM Module Version is older than the version that the camera requests

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.VERSIONMISMATCH
documentation: 0x84002003, Camre returns the error on setting parameter to limit version

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.RUNAS_FACTORYMODE
documentation: 0x84002004, Camera is running as a factory mode

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.IMAGE_UNKNOWNSIGNATURE
documentation: 0x84003001, sigunature of image header is unknown or corrupted

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.IMAGE_NEWRUNTIMEREQUIRED
documentation: 0x84003002, version of image header is newer than version that used DCAM supports

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.NONE
documentation: 0, no error, nothing to have done

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.DELAYEDFRAME
documentation: 0x80000f09, the frame waiting re-load from hardware buffer with SNAPSHOT of DEVICEBUFFER MODE

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.MISSPROP_TRIGGERSOURCE
documentation: 0xE0100110, the trigger mode is internal or syncreadout on using device memory.

class_variables.name: caqtus_devices.cameras.hamamatsu_orca_quest.runtime.dcamapi4.DCAMERR.SUCCESS_PROP_GETATTR
